name: Ziti with Mexican-Style Meat Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and dice the pimientos.
2. In a 12-inch skillet over medium-high heat, cook the ground beef, green pepper, and onion, stirring occasionally until the meat is browned and the peppers and onions are tender.
3. Stir in the water, tomato paste, pimientos, and sauce mix. Cook over high heat until boiling.
4. Reduce the heat to low. Cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
5. Prepare the ziti as directed on the label.
6. Drain the ziti.
7. Serve the meat sauce over the ziti.
